# Azion Docs — observe

> All pages of the observe section. Root index: https://www.azion.com/en/llms.txt

- [Explore Azion Observe products](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/): Azion Observe products assist you in monitoring and accessing information related to your data.
- [Data Stream](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/): Data Stream is an Observe product that allows you to feed your SIEM, big data, and stream processing platforms with access to your content and applications data in real time, adding even more intelligence to your business.
- [Data Stream concepts](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/concepts/): Understand how Data Stream works: log batching, NDJSON and JSON payload formats, endpoint availability monitoring, error treatment for HTTP 503 and 504 responses, and the sampling model.
- [How to add filters on Real-Time Events](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/add-filters-events/): Filter your analysis with the specific variables and type of data you want to receive.
- [How to add filters on Real-Time Metrics](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/add-filters-metrics/): Filter your analysis with the specific variables and type of data you want to access.
- [Analyze logs](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/analyze-logs/): Use Real-Time Events to analyze detailed raw logs.
- [How to analyze metrics on Real-Time Metrics](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/analyze-metrics/): Understand how to analyze metrics through the available charts.
- [How to analyze navigation data from Edge Pulse](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/analyze-navigation-data/): Analyze logs related to navigation collected by using Edge Pulse.
- [How to configure sampling on Data Stream](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/configure-sampling/): Configure the Sampling feature to filter the percentage of data you'll be streaming.
- [Send Data Stream Data to Object Storage](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/connector-azion-object-storage/): Hands-on to configure an Azion Object Storage connector to receive data from Data Stream.
- [Send Data Stream Data via HTTP POST Connector](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/connector-standard-https-post/): Hands-on to configure a HTTP/HTTPS POST connector to receive data from Data Stream.
- [How to associate domains on Data Stream](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/data-stream-associate-domains/): When associating domains with Data Stream, the events related to the specified domains will be collected and sent to its endpoint.
- [How to associate Workloads on Data Stream](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/data-stream-associate-workloads/): When associating Workloads with Data Stream, the events related to the specified workloads will be collected and sent to its endpoint.
- [How to create a custom template on Data Stream](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/data-stream-custom-template/): A custom template on Data Stream allows you to customize which variables you want to use on your analysis according to your needs.
- [How to select variables on Data Stream](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/data-stream-select-variables/): Find the best option of how to choose variables to stream your data.
- [How to set a payload on Data Stream](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/data-stream-set-payload/): Customize a payload while using a Standard HTTP/HTTPS POST connector.
- [Understand Data Stream metrics](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/data-stream-understand-metrics/): You can continuously monitor your streams through Azion Observe products.
- [How to debug functions on Data Stream](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/debugging-functions-data-stream/): The debugging process in functions' code helps you identify if errors are still occurring or if the debug process was successful.
- [How to stop or delete a data stream](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/delete-data-stream/): Follow this guide to stop or delete a data stream in your Azion account.
- [Send Data Stream Data to Amazon Kinesis](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/endpoint-amazon-kinesis/): Hands-on to use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to receive data from Azion Data Stream.
- [How to use Amazon S3 to receive data from Data Stream](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/endpoint-amazon-s3/): Hands-on to configure Amazon S3 to receive data from Data Stream.
- [Send Data Stream Data to Azure Blob Storage](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/endpoint-azure-blob/): Hands-on to use Azure Blob Storage to receive data from Azion Data Stream.
- [Send Data Stream Data to Azure Monitor](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/endpoint-azure-monitor/): Hands-on to use Azure Monitor to receive data from Azion Data Stream.
- [How to use Datadog to receive data from Data Stream](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/endpoint-datadog/): Hands-on to configure Datadog to receive data from Data Stream.
- [Send Data Stream Data to Elasticsearch](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/endpoint-elasticsearch/): Hands-on to use Elasticsearch to receive data from Azion Data Stream.
- [Send Data Stream Data to Google BigQuery](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/endpoint-google-bigquery/): Hands-on to use Google BigQuery endpoint connector to receive data from Data Stream.
- [How to use Splunk to receive data from Data Stream](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/endpoint-splunk/): Hands-on to configure Splunk to receive data from Data Stream.
- [Investigate Requests with Real-Time Events API](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/investigate-requests-graphql-api/): Perform an investigation on requests that are possible attacks with the Real-Time Events GraphQL API.
- [Monitor applications](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/monitor-applications/): Use Real-Time Metrics to visualize data and monitor your applications.
- [Stream data](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/stream-data/): Stream your Azion logs to stream processing, SIEM, and big data platforms.
- [How to understand Real-Time Events logs](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/understand-logs/): Find the best option of how to choose variables to analyze your logs.
- [How to configure Data Stream main settings](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/guides/use-data-stream/): Find out how to configure the main settings of a stream.
- [Data Stream quickstart](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/quickstart/): Create your first stream and start feeding your analysis platform with Azion event logs, using Azion Console or the Azion API.
- [Data Stream reference](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/data-stream/reference/): Complete reference for Data Stream: data sources and their variables, templates, domains, endpoint connector fields, payload settings, and log delivery numbers.
- [Edge Pulse](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/edge-pulse/): Discover how to get detailed insights into your customers' experience and improve your content delivery with Edge Pulse.
- [Edge Pulse first steps](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/edge-pulse/quickstart/): See the first steps for Edge Pulse.
- [Observe Overview](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/overview/): Observe your application's data and improve your decision-making process.
- [Real-Time Events](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/real-time-events/): Real-Time Events is an Observe product that allows you to display logs from your Azion products and services in real time.
- [Real-Time Events first steps](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/real-time-events/quickstart/): See the first steps for Real-Time Events.
- [Real-Time Metrics](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/real-time-metrics/): Real-Time Metrics provides you with real-time access to metrics and helps you optimize the use of Azion products and how your content is delivered.
- [Customize a Grafana Dashboard with Azion Plugin](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/real-time-metrics/guides/azion-plugin-grafana-custom-dash/): The Azion data source plugin on Grafana allows you visualize the data from your existing applications on Azion on a Grafana dashboard.
- [Customize a Log Table with Azion Plugin](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/real-time-metrics/guides/azion-plugin-grafana-customize-log-table/): The Azion data source plugin on Grafana allows you to visualize the data from your Azion applications on a Grafana dashboard.
- [Use a Pre-Built Grafana Dashboard with Azion](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/real-time-metrics/guides/azion-plugin-grafana-pre-built-dash/): The Azion data source plugin on Grafana makes it possible to visualize the data from your existing applications on Azion on a Grafana dashboard.
- [How to use Grafana with best practices](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/real-time-metrics/guides/best-practices-grafana/): While using the Azion data source plugin on Grafana, you can use some best practices to achieve better results.
- [Data Transferred dashboard on Grafana JSON example](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/real-time-metrics/guides/data-transferred-dash/): You can use the JSON example to create a dashboard on Grafana with the Data Transferred metrics from Real-Time Metrics.
- [How to integrate Azion with Grafana](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/real-time-metrics/guides/integrate-grafana/): Integrate with the Azion data source plugin on Grafana to create and visualize charts and tables.
- [Real-Time Metrics GraphQL Dashboard for Grafana](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/real-time-metrics/guides/metrics-dash/): Use this JSON to create a dashboard on Grafana with data from the Real-Time Metrics GraphQL API.
- [How to use Real-Time Metrics](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/real-time-metrics/guides/use-real-time-metrics/): Find out how to use Real-Time Metrics and view your charts on Azion.
- [Real-Time Metrics first steps](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/real-time-metrics/quickstart/): See the first steps for Real-Time Metrics.
- [Historical Real-Time Metrics](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/real-time-metrics/reference/historical-real-time-metrics/): Historical Real-Time Metrics is an Observe product that provides you with real time access to metrics, through graphs, so you can analyze the events of your applications and products configured on Azion.
- [SIEM Azion](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/observe/siem/): Analyze data from dashboards with raw and aggregated data.
